hero.title: Documentation Center
hero.subtitle: Learn how to use the Insight Oracle Data Platform for real-time price monitoring, cross-oracle comparison, and in-depth data analysis.

quickstart.title: Quick Start
quickstart.description: Get started with the Insight platform and explore real-time price data from mainstream oracle protocols.

overview.title: Platform Overview
overview.description: Insight is a professional oracle data analytics platform supporting Chainlink, Pyth, API3, DIA, RedStone, and WINkLink.

register.title: Create Account
register.description: Register to access personalized features like favorites, alerts, and data export. Supports email registration and OAuth (Google, GitHub) login.

search.title: Query Prices
search.description: Enter a trading pair (e.g., ETH/USD) on the price query page to view real-time price data from multiple oracles.

analyze.title: Analyze & Compare
analyze.description: Use the cross-oracle comparison feature to analyze price differences and trends between different oracles.

alert.title: Set Price Alerts
alert.description: Register an account to set price alerts and receive notifications when prices reach thresholds

features.title: Core Features
features.description: Insight platform provides the following core features to help you comprehensively understand oracle data.

priceQuery.title: Price Query
priceQuery.description: Query real-time prices for any trading pair across multiple oracles, with historical data viewing and technical indicator analysis.
priceQuery.highlight3: Technical indicators: RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands

crossOracle.title: Cross-Oracle Comparison
crossOracle.description: Compare price differences for the same trading pair across different oracles to assess oracle reliability.

crossChain.title: Cross-Chain Analysis
crossChain.description: Analyze price consistency of the same asset across different blockchains to discover arbitrage opportunities.

alerts.title: Price Alerts
alerts.description: Set custom price alerts and receive notifications through multiple channels when prices reach thresholds.

accurate.title: Data Export
accurate.description: Support CSV, JSON, PDF, PNG formats

technical.title: Technical Documentation
technical.description: Learn about the technical implementation details of the Insight platform.

methodology.title: Data Methodology
methodology.description: Learn about price aggregation algorithms, risk assessment models, and data quality metric calculations.

api.title: API Interface
api.description: Get oracle data via REST API and WebSocket to integrate into your applications.

architecture.title: System Architecture
architecture.description: Built with Next.js 16 + React 19, using Supabase for data storage and authentication.

dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.description: Integrate 6 mainstream oracle protocols, covering Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, and other chains.

developer.title: Developer Resources
developer.description: Integration guides and technical support for developers.

integration.title: Integration Guide
integration.description: Learn how to integrate Insight data into your DeFi applications or data analysis tools.

examples.title: Code Examples
examples.description: View example code for calling Insight API using JavaScript/TypeScript.

q1.question: How to get an API key?
q1.answer: After logging in, you can generate and manage API keys in the Data Management panel on the Settings page.

q2.question: Which oracle protocols are supported?
q2.answer: Currently supports Chainlink, Pyth, API3, RedStone, DIA, WINkLink, and other mainstream oracles.

q3.question: What is the data update frequency?
q3.answer: Price data is pushed in real-time via WebSocket. The specific update frequency depends on each oracle protocol's update mechanism.
